title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
